# MuleSoft Spring Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of Spring Module documentation.
> See [Spring Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/spring-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Spring Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Spring Module 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/spring-module/latest/index.md)
- [Spring Module 2.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/spring-module/latest/spring-module-reference.md)
- [Troubleshooting Spring Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/spring-module/latest/spring-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Spring Module to Version 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/spring-module/latest/spring-module-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Spring Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/spring-module/latest/spring-xml-maven.md)
